name: effective_cache_size
description: Sets the planner's assumption about the total size of the data caches.
tuning_notes: Planner's OS cache estimate. Doesn't allocate memory, only affects plans.

name: max_parallel_workers_per_gather
description: Sets the maximum number of parallel processes per executor node.
tuning_notes: Parallelism for analytical queries. Limited by CPU cores.

name: random_page_cost
description: Sets the planner's estimate of the cost of a nonsequentially fetched disk page.
tuning_notes: Critical for index vs seqscan decisions. SSD: 1.0-1.5, HDD: 3.0-4.0

name: shared_buffers
description: Sets the number of shared memory buffers used by the server.
tuning_notes: Most impactful knob. Log scale because doubling matters more than addition.

name: work_mem
description: Sets the maximum memory to be used for query workspaces.
tuning_notes: Per-operation memory. Total can be work_mem * connections * operations_per_query
